summary: Verified the 3 shipped features end-to-end: (A) Animated BulbLogo SVG renders in Nav + Footer on / with class 'accutek-bulb-animate', and is absent on /admin. (B) Calculator → Contact handoff works for all 5 calculators (solar/battery/mount/generator/roi): each *-attach button saves to localStorage, shows the 'Estimate attached' sonner toast, and navigates to /contact. The contact-calc-results block renders with rows; single remove (contact-calc-remove-{tool}) and clear-all (contact-calc-clear-all) work. (C) /random-nonexistent-route renders NotFoundPage with all expected testids (not-found-page/path/home/tools/contact); Nav + Footer present. End-to-end: attach solar → submit /contact → contact-success shows, localStorage cleared, retrieved lead from /api/admin/leads contains calculator_results as a non-empty LIST with full key set {tool,label,summary,raw,savedAt}. Backend: POST /api/leads accepts list-shape calculator_results AND retains backward compatibility with null/missing/dict shapes. Regressions clean: consent still enforced (400), /api/admin/leads requires Bearer (401 without), no emergent-badge/emergent-main.js in / HTML, all 5 calculator tab triggers and panels still load. Backend pytest: 18/18 passed.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is now 478 lines with models + routes + auth + startup intertwined — flag from iteration 5 still open; split into modules before next feature.

LeadCreate.calculator_results is typed Optional[Any]. This works but loses structural validation — consider a Pydantic model: List[CalcResultRow] where CalcResultRow has tool/label/summary/raw/savedAt fields so malformed payloads 422 fast. Today an arbitrary blob would be accepted.

calc-store.js uses a custom 'accutek-calc-updated' event for same-tab sync but does NOT listen to the native 'storage' event for cross-tab sync. Minor UX gap if a user has /tools and /contact open in two tabs.

NotFoundPage hard-codes the inline path-rendering — fine for now, but if the path could ever contain user-controlled query strings, ensure React's text escaping (which it does) is the only sanitizer relied on; do not switch to dangerouslySetInnerHTML.
BulbLogo uses React.useId(); the resulting gradient IDs are unique per render but if SSR + hydration is ever added, double-check ID stability between server and client to avoid hydration warnings.
seed_data_creation: Inserted TEST_-prefixed leads: TEST_CalcList User, TEST_CalcPersist, TEST_CalcNull, TEST_CalcMissing, TEST_CalcDictLegacy, TEST_NoConsent2, TEST_E2E Calc User (plus carryover TEST_* rows from prior iterations). Easy to clean by email prefix `test_calc_*` / `test_e2e_calc_*`.
context_for_next_testing_agent: New backend test file /app/backend/tests/test_calculator_results.py covers: list-shape calculator_results round-trip, persistence via /api/admin/leads, null + missing-field backwards compat, legacy dict shape, consent regression, admin Bearer required, no Emergent badge in HTML. Frontend testids used: bulb-logo, calc-tab-{solar|battery|mount|generator|roi}, calc-{tool}, {tool}-attach, contact-calc-results, contact-calc-row-{tool}, contact-calc-remove-{tool}, contact-calc-clear-all, contact-name, contact-email, contact-consent-checkbox, contact-submit, contact-success, not-found-page/path/home/tools/contact. Calc handoff verified by: localStorage key 'accutek_calc_results' (cleared on successful submit) + 'accutek-calc-updated' window event.
